BUGFIX: ConversationsListView.createNewSession() — nil-then-async-set pattern (selectedSession=nil then DispatchMain{selectedSession=s}) fixes SwiftUI navigationDestination(item:) bug when navigating from one non-nil session to another

key_facts.archive_note: xcodebuild archive from terminal fails with errSecInternalComponent (keychain locked) — use Xcode GUI: Product > Destination > Any iOS Device (arm64), then Product > Archive
key_facts.chat_params_note: ChatParams(modelOverride, temperature, topP, extraSystemPrompt) — all 3 LLM services accept params; auto-persisted via didSet in ChatViewModel
key_facts.dossier_list_note: DossierKBListView and DossierDocumentListView both use List (not ScrollView+LazyVStack) — required for swipeActions support
key_facts.arch_tab_note: DossierTab .arch is now LOG tab showing DossierArchiveView (chat sessions); arch stats live in DossierQueryView.retrievalCard
key_facts.chat_settings_note: ChatSettingsSheet is module-internal (not private) — used by both ChatView and DossierChatView
key_facts.new_chat_fix_note: navigationDestination(item:) requires nil-then-async-set when changing from one non-nil value to another
key_facts.h2_note: Large file guard: 250 MB limit in ingest(), PDF page cap 1000 in PDFParser, OCR page cap 200 + 100 DPI in VisionOCRParser
